name: @stackra/kbd
purpose: Keyboard shortcut registry, command palette, catalog, hints, and customization primitives — powered by TanStack Hotkeys and HeroUI Pro Command.
capabilities: Kbd hint components for inline shortcut display
when_to_use: Adding a command palette, global shortcuts, or per-scope keyboard bindings with user customization.
when_not_to_use: For plain document-level keydown handlers use useEffect; for router navigation use @stackra/routing.
